sys_script_include.description:
v2.7 STRY0101692 - REQ – Respond Clarification Request via Modal - add Task Administrators to the people who can respond STRY0101754 - "Disable Email Task Information" Tasker setting does not disable "New Email" button STRY0104349 - Request Extension on Platform does not reload form and should be available from more states STRY0104533 - Respond Extension should be available from more states and available for Task Owner's Task Manager and Task Administrators
v2.6 Updated to put all UI Actions condition checks into this file
v2.5.3 STRY0073605 - top task Assigneed Member can also enable and disable Shared docuements and shared attachments STRY0083547 - FIX- STRETCH: Task Form - "Create Subtasks for each Sub OU" on Task form Context Menu enabled based on tasker Roles and Task States STRY0085434 - Assigned Member can mark as complete - UI MODAL - (Portal & Platform) Modal for Review Comments - "Mark Complete" UI Action - as Assigned Member STRY0085333 - UI MODAL - (Portal & Platform) Modal for Send to Review - Response Comments - "Reviewer" field Editable STRY0085338 - UI MODAL - (Portal & Platform) Modal for Send to Review - Response Comments - "Reviewer" field Read-Only STRY0082305 - UI MODAL - (Portal & Platform) Modal for Rework Comments - "Send to Rework" UI Action STRY0082933 - FIX- STRETCH: Task Form - "Create Subtasks for each OU Member" on Task form Context Menu enabled based on tasker Roles and Task States STRY0085827 - CMS: Users can deactivate "Template Tasks", but the task is still created when the template is started/task tree is created STRY0088624 - Extension Response Breaks when there's no suspense date on the task
v2.5.16 - STRY0079327 - Issue - run template was not working from Platform pages
Includes for UI Action Conditions: v2.5.13 - Issue with Template OU rights corrected
v2.5.10 | 05.27.20 - Update on Who can Response Clarification
v2.5.4 | 05/01/2020
- Who can Request Reassignment - Who can Reassignment Response - Who can Request Extension - Who can Extension Response - Who can Request Clarification - Who can Send Clarification - Who can Save a Task Tree as a Template - Who can Run a Template from a Task
v2.5.0 | 04/09/2020
- Who can Run Template - Who can Enable/Disable Shared Attachments - Who can Enable/Disable Shared Documents - Who can Send Task As Email
v2.2.23 | Mar-2020 | 2.2 Patch 9
- Who can Cancel a Task - Who can Mark as Complete on time - Who can Request Extension - Who can modify Suspense Date (tasking authority or task owner etc) - Who can MarkCompletedOnTimeLateUIAction - Who can Open a Completed or Cancelled task - Who has Organizational Admin or Is a Member of OU
sys_script_include.name: uiConditionCheck
